chunks.text: At my school, students have to wear a uniform.
Every morning, we have to be in the classroom on time.
In class, we have to study many subjects: math, science, and English.
When I get home, I have to finish my homework before dinner.
My sister sometimes asks, “ Do you have to finish all of it tonight?
On Sunday, I do not have to go to school
but I have to wash the dishes at home.
It is sometimes hard, but helping my family is very important.
